name: bitcorn-lightning-application
description: Root-level dev orchestration for the Bitcorn Lightning app. The app itself lives in app/api, app/web, and cloudflare-worker — see docs/dev-setup.md for how to run all three locally against a Polar regtest network.

scripts.dev:treasury: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.treasury -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:memberA: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.member-a  -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:memberB: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.member-b  -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:webT: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3101 npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort
scripts.dev:webA: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3102 npm run dev -- --port 5174 --strictPort
scripts.dev:webB: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3103 npm run dev -- --port 5175 --strictPort
scripts.dev:kill: lsof -ti:3101,3102,3103,5173,5174,5175 | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'dev ports cleared'
